news.title: Australia's NEXTDC to raise $1.07 billion to accelerate Sydney data centre rollout
news.snippet: Australia's NEXTDC said on Monday it plans to raise A$1.5 billion ($1.07 billion) to accelerate the rollout of its S4 Sydney data centre and align with...

news.title: Barrenjoey joins two others to advise on NextDC’s $1.5bn raising
news.snippet: NextDC chief executive Craig Scroggie is raising $1.5bn to fund data centre expansion in Western Sydney. Picture: Mark Cranitch.
